Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.

3.7.1 City, Clan, Class, and House channels
(See
HELP CHANNELS
,
HELP CITY
,
HELP HOUSES
,
HELP
CLANS
)
City
----
To
speak
to
others
in your city:
-
CT
Example: CT Hello everybody in my city!
Clans
-----
To speak to others in one of your clans:
-
CLT
, CLT1, CLT2, CLT3, etc.
Example: CLT2 Hi clansters!
House
-----
To speak to others in your house:
-
HNT
- For newer members of
houses
-
HT
- For house general
membership
-
HTS
- A house
channel
with restricted access
Example: HNT Hello everybody!
